raw_title: Techno-refusal as a generative orientation to the future
title_en: Techno-refusal as a generative orientation to the future
title_zh: 技术拒绝作为面向未来的生成性取向
plain_summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨了“技术拒绝”这一概念，不是简单地反对技术，而是将其视为一种积极、有创造力的方式来思考未来。作者认为，拒绝某些技术可以帮助我们想象和构建更美好的未来。
plain_summary_en: This article explores the concept of 'techno-refusal' not as a simple rejection of technology, but as a positive and creative way to think about the future. The author argues that refusing certain technologies can help us imagine and build better futures.
research_direction_zh: 批判性技术研究、未来学、技术与社会
research_direction_en: Critical technology studies, futures studies, technology and society
